name: EdCast Learning Experience Platform API
what_it_does: EdCast LXP (acquired by SAP 2022, now SAP SuccessFactors Learning) enterprise learning experience platform REST API for AI-powered personalized learning pathways, content curation, and skills-based talent development. Enables AI agents to manage personalized learning pathway creation and recommendation for employee skill development automation, handle content curation and aggregation from internal and third-party sources for learning content intelligence, access skills taxonomy and competency mapping for workforce skills gap analysis, retrieve learner progress and completion tracking for compliance and development reporting, manage social learning and peer content sharing for collaborative learning automation, handle learning pathway assignment and cohort management for talent program automation, access AI-powered content recommendations for personalized learning automation, retrieve xAPI/tin Can statements for LRS integration and learning analytics, manage channel and playlist creation for curated content collections, and integrate EdCast with SAP SuccessFactors, HRIS platforms, and content providers via REST and SSO.
use_cases: Recommending learning paths from skills gap agents
Curating content from AI-powered curation agents
Tracking skills development from talent analytics agents
Assigning compliance training from HR automation agents
not_for: SCORM-heavy compliance LMS (use Cornerstone or Saba)
Instructor-led training scheduling and classroom management
Formal academic credentialing and degree programs
best_when: An enterprise organization wanting AI agents to automate personalized learning pathway recommendations, skills-based content curation, and talent development tracking within EdCast/SAP SuccessFactors Learning as the enterprise LXP.
avoid_when: SAP ACQUISITION INTEGRATION UNCERTAINTY: EdCast was acquired by SAP in April 2022 and is being integrated into SAP SuccessFactors Learning; standalone EdCast API endpoints may be deprecated as integration progresses; verify current API investment roadmap with SAP before building deep EdCast-specific automation. SKILLS TAXONOMY ALIGNMENT WITH HRIS: Automated skills mapping in EdCast must align with HRIS competency framework; automated skills gap calculations using EdCast taxonomy not synchronized with performance management system creates inconsistent employee development data. LEARNING COMPLETION AS COMPLIANCE EVIDENCE: Automated learning completion tracking in EdCast for regulatory compliance must distinguish LXP 'viewed' status from formal completion with assessment; automated compliance reporting using informal engagement metrics creates regulatory audit risk.

auth.notes: EdCast uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Originally Santa Clara, California HQ. Acquired by SAP April 2022 for ~$1B+. Now part of SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite. Pre-acquisition: 1,000+ enterprise customers. Fortune 500 and global enterprise focus. AI-powered learning pathway personalization. Skills ontology with 50,000+ skills. Competes with Degreed, 360Learning, and Cornerstone for enterprise LXP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual subscription, now bundled with SAP SuccessFactors
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; bundled with SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite; standalone pricing phased out post-acquisition
pricing.notes: Santa Clara CA (pre-acquisition). SAP acquisition 2022. Now part of SAP SuccessFactors. Enterprise annual subscription bundled with HCM. AI-powered LXP with skills ontology.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; learning recommendation and content API throttled; webhooks for completion events

known_agent_gotchas: SAP ACQUISITION API STABILITY RISK: EdCast API is being integrated into SAP SuccessFactors Learning; standalone EdCast REST endpoints may be deprecated on SAP's integration timeline; automated workflows built on EdCast-specific API paths require SAP roadmap validation before production investment

LXP COMPLETION VS FORMAL COMPLIANCE COMPLETION: EdCast engagement events (viewed, liked, shared) are distinct from formal completion with passing score; automated compliance reporting must use formal completion records with assessment pass/fail, not engagement metrics; engagement-based compliance reporting creates audit and regulatory risk

SKILLS TAXONOMY SYNCHRONIZATION WITH HRIS: Automated skills mapping between EdCast skills ontology and HRIS/performance management competency framework requires explicit field mapping; automated skills gap calculation using unsynchronized taxonomies creates inconsistent employee development records

SAP SSO and SuccessFactors tenant coupling — post-acquisition EdCast instances are being migrated to SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS); automated agent OAuth credentials may require re-registration during SAP IAS migration; monitor SAP migration communications for credential update requirements

Content provider licensing for AI recommendations — EdCast aggregates content from LinkedIn Learning, Coursera, Udemy Business, and internal sources; automated content recommendation workflows must verify learner entitlement for each content provider before delivering recommendations; recommending unlicensed content creates access errors and user experience failures

xAPI LRS endpoint deprecation — EdCast xAPI/Tin Can LRS endpoints for learning record export may be deprecated or migrated to SAP Learning Record Store during SuccessFactors integration; automated LRS integration requires endpoint validation post-migration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise LXP. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Employee learning and skills data. SAP acquisition adds SuccessFactors security posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise LXP. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Employee learning, skills, and development data.
